user_intent_preservation.original_goal: Migrate 3-phase PWM motor control to new AURIX target
user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Generate 3-phase complementary, center-aligned PWM at 20 kHz with 1 µs deadtime (HS active-high, LS active-low) on ATOM0 CH0–CH2 routed to P20.8/P20.9, P20.10/P20.11, P20.12/P20.13; configure ATOM0 CH3 as a 50% edge-aligned 20 kHz trigger routed to TMADC via EGTM ADC_OUT0.SEL0 to ADC_TRIG[36] and also exported to P33.0; heartbeat LED on P03.9 toggles every 500 ms; duty updates in a 500 ms main-loop poll; replace IfxScuWdt with IfxWtu; consolidate into a single .c/.h pair together with TMADC init (5-channel mapping TBD).
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Use unified PWM driver IfxEgtm_Pwm on TC4xx with EGTM Cluster 0 ATOM0 channels (CH0–CH2 center-aligned complementary with DTM for 1 µs deadtime, CH3 edge-aligned at 50%). Enable EGTM clocks via IfxEgtm_Cmu, configure deadtime via IfxEgtm_Dtm, route trigger to TMADC via IfxEgtm_Trigger_trigToAdc, set ATOM TOUT pins via IfxEgtm_PinMap_setAtomTout, manage heartbeat and GPIO using IfxPort, initialize TMADC with IfxAdc_Tmadc, and replace watchdog calls with IfxWtu.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: Unified EGTM PWM supports multi-channel, center/edge-aligned PWM with synchronous updates and integrates cleanly with ATOM and DTM. It simplifies 3-phase complementary PWM configuration while allowing deadtime setup via IfxEgtm_Dtm and trigger routing via IfxEgtm_Trigger.

runtime_function.name: updateEgtmAtom3phInvDuty
runtime_function.purpose: Periodic (500 ms) duty cycle updates for all three PWM phases with synchronous application; heartbeat LED toggle on P03.9.

driver_changes: IfxGtm_Tom/IfxGtm_Atom low-level usage → EGTM ATOM0 via IfxEgtm_Pwm with IfxEgtm_Dtm for deadtime
IfxGtm_Trig_toEVadc → IfxEgtm_Trigger_trigToAdc (route ATOM0.CH3 to TMADC trigger bus)
IfxGtm_PinMap → IfxEgtm_PinMap for TOUT routing (GPIO remains IfxPort/IfxPort_PinMap)

api_changes.reason: Watchdog API family migration; disable API not listed in template, use available IfxWtu initialization/control functions
Unified PWM duty update on TC4xx

migration_notes.context_preserved: The configuration keeps ATOM0 CH0–CH2 as center-aligned complementary PWM at 20 kHz with 1 µs deadtime and correct polarities, configures ATOM0 CH3 as a 50% edge-aligned 20 kHz trigger routed to TMADC (ADC_TRIG[36]) and exported to a TOUT pin, uses IfxPort to toggle P03.9 every 500 ms, updates duty in the 500 ms main loop, and replaces IfxScuWdt with IfxWtu. Pin routing uses IfxEgtm_PinMap (timer) and IfxPort (GPIO) as required. Any device/package-specific TOUT selections (P20.x, P33.0) and TMADC channel/pin mapping remain to be validated against IfxEgtm_PinMap and IfxAdc_Tmadc configuration for the exact TC4D7 package.
